description: Three critical data processing pipelines in the 'data-platform' namespace are failing due to ephemeral storage misconfigurations. Remediate the 'report-generator', 'data-cache', and 'query-engine' deployments by adjusting ephemeral storage limits and requests to resolve Eviction and Pending states. Do not alter container 'command' or 'args' to ensure applications process their full simulated data payloads. Clean up all 'Evicted' pods in the namespace to restore operational hygiene. Login to Rancher at https://localhost (admin / Admin12345678!).

metadata.occupation: Data Platform Engineer / Site Reliability Engineer
